# genshin-langdata — Source Metadata

**Source:** genshin-langdata  
**URL:** https://github.com/xicri/genshin-langdata  
**Tier:** alias_reference / terminology_reference  
**Import status:** deferred_missing_local_data

---

## Provenance

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Author/Maintainer | xicri |
| Repository type | GitHub public repository |
| License | **Not yet verified** |
| Last known activity | Actively maintained (reported ~2 days before Hermes assessment) |
| Content type | Multilingual game terminology dictionaries |
| Languages covered | EN, JA, zhCN, zhTW (+ pronunciationJa) |

---

## Reported content

- 36 dictionary files
- Characters by region
- Artifacts, weapons, items
- Quests, dialogue
- Locations, organizations
- Story terms
- Includes Nod-Krai names (Columbina Hyposelenia, Kuutar, Ineffa, Aino, Lauma, Varka)

---

## Allowed use in LoreResearch

- Alias index building
- Multilingual terminology mapping
- Entity name normalization
- Search support / candidate discovery
- Duplicate entity detection
- Cross-reference assistance

---

## Explicitly disallowed use

- **NOT** lore evidence
- **NOT** canon proof
- **NOT** relationship proof
- **NOT** source-status upgrade basis
- **NOT** claim mapping input without primary source chain
- Dictionary notes/examples are NOT lore evidence

---

## Required before import

1. Local clone or approved download
2. License verification
3. Manifest populated with commit hash and checksums
4. Controlled subset selection applied (see pass-25-7-controlled-subset-selection.md)
5. Human approval
